history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A Chibi-style anime character with purple hair and large purple eyes is depicted from the chest up, set against a plain white background. The character is wearing a dark hat adorned with gold geometric patterns and a large purple bow with white accents in her hair. She is holding a carton of "COMPLETED PROCESSED JUICE" with a blue checkmark next to the word "SUCCESS" and a straw. Her left hand is propped up, supporting her chin, giving her a somewhat bored or contemplative expression. The art style is reminiscent of popular mobile games, with clean lines and vibrant colors, specifically a palette dominated by purple, white, black, and gold. The lighting is bright and even, characteristic of digital illustrations with no discernible shadows, creating a clean and cheerful, albeit slightly stoic, mood.
